designerReference._value: First, we'll check that it's really you
First and last name as they appear to your ID
You must be 16 years or older
We will verify this email address by email
Confirm password should match with a pin
<input type="file" class="margin-left-12px" title="Certified ID" [(ngModel)]="page.clientDetails.ID" required (change)=upload($event) name="ID"/>
<input type="file" class="margin-left-12px" title="Proof of residence"  [(ngModel)]="page.clientDetails.proog" required (change)=upload($event) name="proof" />
Proof of residence must have your full name
<input type="file" class="margin-left-12px" title="Client clear picture"  [(ngModel)]="page.clientDetails.picture" required (change)=upload($event) name="picture" />
Your personal information is safe with us
